title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Ardsley, NY | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Ardsley, Westchester. Humane bat extraction, cleanup, and prevention. Licensed experts. Call for same-day service!
intro: Ardsley homeowners facing bat infestations need immediate, humane solutions to protect their properties and families. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bat removal and exclusion services throughout Ardsley and Westchester County, ensuring safe extraction and long-term prevention. Our certified technicians use proven methods to eliminate bat colonies while sealing entry points to prevent future intrusions.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Westchester communities like Ardsley, we understand the unique challenges posed by the area's mature trees and historic homes that often attract bats. Our licensed team combines humane removal techniques with thorough exclusion work, backed by warranties and 24/7 emergency response for Ardsley residents.
localContext: Ardsley's tree-lined streets and mix of Tudor-style homes and vintage properties create ideal conditions for bat colonies seeking attic spaces and roof gaps. The village's proximity to wooded areas along the Saw Mill River Parkway and older construction in neighborhoods near Pascone Park mean many homes are vulnerable to bat entry points that require professional sealing.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Ardsley?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Ardsley typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on colony size, access difficulty, and the extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with most Ardsley homes requiring comprehensive sealing of multiple entry points.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in Ardsley regulated?
faqs.answer: Yes, bat removal in New York is strictly regulated to protect bat populations. We follow all state and federal guidelines, including seasonal restrictions during maternity seasons (typically May-August when flightless pups are present). Our licensed technicians ensure all removal is humane and compliant with wildlife protection laws.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have bats in my Ardsley home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds at dusk or dawn, bat droppings (guano) in attics or near entry points, brown staining around gaps in soffits or rooflines, and seeing bats emerge at sunset. Many Ardsley homes have bats in attics, chimneys, or behind shutters without owners realizing it until populations grow.

faqs.question: What does bat exclusion involve?
faqs.answer: Our bat exclusion process includes a thorough inspection to identify all entry points, installation of one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to exit but not return, sealing all gaps and openings with durable materials, attic cleanup and sanitation if needed, and a warranty on our work. We ensure your Ardsley home is permanently protected from re-entry.
